title: El malvado Carabel
writer: Wenceslao Fernández Flórez, Manuel Suárez Caso, Fernando Fernán Gómez
actors: Fernando Fernán Gómez, María Luz Galicia, Rafael López Somoza
plot: Amaro Carabel, about to get married, asks for a salary increase that gets him fired. He then decides to stop being an honest man so as to not end up single.
